nl_query: Which faculty members have prepared answer keys for papers where they are also assigned as the board coordinator, creating a potential conflict of interest?
failed_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fc.name AS preparer_name, bc.employee_id AS board_coordinator_employee_id
FROM   faculty_cache fc
JOIN   board_coordinator bc ON bc.employee_id = fc.employee_id
JOIN   answer_key_preparer akp ON akp.employee_id = fc.employee_id
JOIN   board b ON b.id = bc.board_id
JOIN   question_paper qp ON qp.id = b.qp_id
WHERE  akp.answer_key_id IN (
  SELECT ak.id
  FROM   answer_key ak
  JOIN   board b ON b.qp_id = ak.qp_id
  WHERE  b.id = :board_id
  AND  ak.status = 'APPROVED'
)
AND  fc.is_active = TRUE
AND  bc.is_active = TRUE
ORDER  BY fc.name, bc.employee_id;
error:
Validation failed (cost): EXPLAIN revealed a SQL error: syntax error at or near ":"
LINE 1: ...k JOIN board b ON b.qp_id = ak.qp_id WHERE b.id = :board_id ...
                                                             ^
